title: DoorsCraft Legacy
description: A fanmade Doors mod made with MCreator.
body:
A fanmade doors mod. Sorry I haven't added the other entities though. Here's the existing entities:

- Rush
- Seek
- Ambush (spawn egg does not show)
- Figure
- Jeff(villager proffesion, block is sculk)

Here are the items:

- Crucifix
- Skeleton Key
I don't have Dupe, but I have a painting of his face.

He also has his own damage type, with custom death messages.

This mod is also available on Curseforge.

MADE  WITH MCREATOR.
